# Resource Manager API, gRPC: WorkspaceService.GetWorkspace

Returns a single workspace by its UUID.

## gRPC request

```proto
rpc GetWorkspace (GetWorkspaceRequest) returns (Workspace)
```

## GetWorkspaceRequest

Request to read one workspace by UUID.

```json
{
  "id": "string"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Required. Stable unique identifier of the workspace to retrieve.<br/>The value must be a valid UUID string. |

## Workspace

Workspace stores canonical metadata for a workspace resource within an organization.

```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "organization_id": "string",
  "state": "State",
  "name": "string",
  "description": "string",
  "create_time": "string",
  "update_time": "string",
  "delete_time": "string",
  "purge_time": "string",
  "etag": "string",
  "annotations": {
    "key": "string"
  }
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Identifier. Stable unique identifier of the workspace.<br/>The value is generated by the server and is returned as a UUID string.<br/>The value is immutable after creation.<br/>Clients must not provide this field when creating a workspace. |
| organization_id | string | Output only. Stable unique identifier of the parent organization.<br/>The value is set by the server from the create request and is returned as<br/>a UUID string. The parent organization of a workspace never changes. |
| state | enum State | Output only. Server-computed lifecycle state of the workspace.<br/>The value is always one of the defined non-zero enum values.<br/><br/>Available values: `STATE_UNSPECIFIED`, `CREATING`, `ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `DELETING`, `DELETED`, `FAILED`. |
| name | string | Optional. Human-readable name of the workspace.<br/>The value may be updated by clients and must not exceed 256 characters. |
| description | string | Optional. Free-form description of the workspace.<br/>The value may be updated by clients and must not exceed 1024 characters. |
| create_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the workspace was created. |
| update_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the workspace was most recently updated. |
| delete_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the workspace was soft-deleted. |
| purge_time | Timestamp | Output only. Time when the soft-deleted workspace is scheduled to be purged. |
| etag | string | Optional. Opaque concurrency token for the workspace.<br/>If this value is provided on update or delete, it must exactly match the<br/>current server-side etag or the request is rejected. Clients must not set<br/>this field when creating a workspace. |
| annotations | map<string, string> | Optional. Client-provided metadata for tooling and integrations.<br/>Use namespaced keys such as "example.com/key" to avoid collisions between<br/>independent producers of annotations. |

## State

State describes the lifecycle state of a workspace resource.

| Value | Number | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| STATE_UNSPECIFIED | 0 | Invalid value. Stored resources and API responses must not use this state. |
| CREATING | 1 | The workspace is being created. |
| ACTIVE | 2 | The workspace is active and available for use. |
| SUSPENDED | 3 | The workspace is suspended and normal operations are restricted. |
| DELETING | 4 | The workspace is being deleted. |
| DELETED | 5 | The workspace has been deleted. |
| FAILED | 6 | The workspace entered a failed state. |
